questions.label: Capability domains covered by the 41-doc corpus and their clusters
Corpus sources feeding each candidate child
Hub vs umbrella structural model + coupling signals

keyFindings.label: Corpus has two orthogonal axes: domain (interface/layout/color/motion) x mode (build/audit/refine)
audit.md proves impeccable is a shared-context HUB with in-hub routing
Three structural exemplars in corpus: hub (impeccable), umbrella (designer-skills), router (ui-skills-root)
impeccable is a complete hub-with-nested-mode-packets skill (parent template)
The sk-design-* family already exists as cross-referencing siblings with no parent
Coupling asymmetry: interface (judgment) vs md-generator (Playwright backend) share only DESIGN.md
Coupling signal matrix: 5 umbrella, 1 hub, 2 neutral
Recommendation: umbrella-router parent + shared base, hub inside interface child
Keep flat sk-design-* names (umbrella makes this free) = zero reference rewrites

recommendation.structuralModel: umbrella-router over sibling family; hub structure inside interface child; not a monolithic hub
recommendation.compat: keep flat names; md-generator->spec via alias; augment interface; additive shared base; advisor+skill-graph rebuild gate

ruledOut.approach: Hub co-loading all children; 23 commands as children
Folding md-generator into co-loaded hub; renaming without aliases
Monolithic single hub; flat no-parent sibling set

openDials: Output child: keep sk-design-output or fold sources as references
Cross-lineage reconciliation: umbrella vote vs any hub vote
